services.title: ERP Solutions
services.description: Developing and customizing ERP solutions with use Python and JavaScript.

responsibilities: Designed and developed Healthcare ERP systems using PHP and MySQL
Implemented core healthcare modules including OPD, IPD, Accounts, Stock, Inventory, and other hospital management processes
Built modern healthcare websites using React.js with responsive and user-friendly UI
Design, develop, and customize ERP solutions using ERPNext and Frappe Framework
Implement Manufacturing, Stock, Accounts, and Commercial (LC) processes in ERPNext
Develop server-side scripts using Python and client-side logic using JavaScript
Assisted in frontend development tasks, ensuring seamless integration of new features and maintaining code quality standards
Contributed to the design of user interfaces and user experiences, focusing on creating intuitive, attractive, and user-centered solutions
Delivered software demonstrations and client presentations, effectively communicating technical functionalities and value propositions to stakeholders
Collaborated with the development team to deliver polished web applications

projects.name: UCB Bank Card Offers Microsite
highlights: Designed and developed a dynamic microsite for UCB Bank to showcase card offers categorized by lifestyle, travel, dining, shopping, and more
Built with React.js for component-based architecture ensuring smooth navigation and efficient rendering
Implemented responsive UI using Bootstrap and custom Vanilla CSS for cross-device compatibility
Integrated Framer Motion for modern animations and interactive transitions
Structured with reusable components and scalable design patterns
